heading: Functions of Veterans Health Administration: in general
label: 7301 Functions of Veterans Health Administration: in general
notes: Amendments1992—Subsec. (a). substituted “Under Secretary for Health is” for “Chief Medical Director is” and inserted at end “The Under Secretary for Health may be referred to as the Chief Medical Director.”Pub. L. 102–405
amendments: Amendments1992—Subsec. (a). substituted “Under Secretary for Health is” for “Chief Medical Director is” and inserted at end “The Under Secretary for Health may be referred to as the Chief Medical Director.”Pub. L. 102–405

children.label: a
children.text: There is in the Department of Veterans Affairs a Veterans Health Administration. The Under Secretary for Health is the head of the Administration. The Under Secretary for Health may be referred to as the Chief Medical Director.

children.label: b
children.text: The primary function of the Administration is to provide a complete medical and hospital service for the medical care and treatment of veterans, as provided in this title and in regulations prescribed by the Secretary pursuant to this title.
